name: Wild Mushroom and Parsley Saute
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces mushrooms, wiped clean and thinly sliced
4 ounces wild mushrooms, trimmed and thinly sliced
2 cups packed curly parsley leaves, stemmed and finely minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. When the butter is foaming subsides, add the minced garlic.
3. Add the mushroom slices (both regular and wild) to the skillet and sauté for about 1 minute or until they are well coated with butter.
4. Stir in the white wine vinegar and 1 tablespoon of water.
5. Cover the skillet and simmer for 4 minutes, or until the mushrooms are tender.
6. Uncover the skillet and let the excess liquid evaporate.
7. Stir in the parsley, then cover and simmer until the parsley has wilted.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve with one of your veal recipes.
Yield: 2 servings
